prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model, which is a common approach for stock price forecasting. This model assumes that daily log returns are normally distributed and constant over time. We estimated the historical daily mean log return (drift) and the standard deviation of daily log returns (volatility) for MA using approximately the last year of historical data. The calculated daily mean log return was approximately 0.0004, and the daily standard deviation was approximately 0.0157. These parameters were then used to project the price for the next 7 days. The point estimate represents the expected price after 7 days, compounded by the estimated drift. The confidence intervals were derived using the projected mean and standard deviation of cumulative log returns over 7 days, corresponding to the Z-scores for the respective confidence levels.
